Interface sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.Sortable

public interface Sortable
extends Object
Interface allowing a class to be used with QuickSort.java

lessThan(Object)
True if this object is strictly smaller than the target.

lessThan 
  public abstract boolean lessThan(Object target)
True if this object is strictly smaller than the target. if they are equal, return false.
